title: CTOV - Wizards Compat
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and Wizards mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Wizards. You will find wizard tower. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**Wizard mod**

Wizard mod can be obtained [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
